scores.correctness_notes: Priority order is wrong: agent states BlockedStatus > WaitingStatus > MaintenanceStatus > ActiveStatus, but the correct order per gold standard is error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active (maintenance outranks waiting). Also omits the important constraint that ErrorStatus and UnknownStatus cannot be used with add_status(). The main example only shows collect_unit_status rather than demonstrating both collect_app_status and collect_unit_status with separate handlers as in the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: The priority order inversion (waiting ranked above maintenance) is a factual error about framework behaviour. No entirely fabricated API names, but self.config.get() is used instead of the more standard self.model.config.get() — minor but potentially misleading.
